title: Moving Meditation
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Instrument_of_Meditation.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A Togruta Jedi using a form of Moving Meditation]]
{{Quote|Jedi who enter Moving Meditation feel as if they can tackle any task.|[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Skarch Vaunk]]|<ref name="The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref>}}
'''Moving Meditation''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] meditation technique where one meditated while repairing and building mechanical devices, or simply focusing on a moving object.

==History==
{{Quote|There are others who may achieve this in occupying the mind, in achieving a moving meditation where operating on machinery achieves a similar effect.|[[Kreia]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
[[File:AnakinAaylaMovingMeditation.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Anakin Skywalker meditating]]
Moving Meditation was learned by the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] while trying to improve the functionality of her [[Cleaning droid/Legends|utility droid]] [[T3-M4]], which had lost many programs in its behavior core in addition to the damage taken to its frame in the times during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. [[Bao-Dur]], a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] ex-military engineer who traveled with her, may also have been a practitioner of this technique, even prior to his training in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], able to find peace only when repairing something. Other Jedi known to have adopted this particular form of meditation include [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]], and possibly [[Cay Qel-Droma]]. Following the loss of his left arm in the [[Beast Wars]], Cay used his remarkable skills to give himself a "better fighting" one, focusing on the appendage of an old [[XT-6 droid]] he calmed the pain and regained his strengths. Anakin would often meditate in such a way to shrug off disturbing thoughts and delusions. Another notable example of moving meditation would be [[Galen Marek]] repairing the damaged [[Lightsaber pike/Legends|lightsaber pike]] of [[Kazdan Paratus]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
*[[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]]
*[[Republic 62|''Republic'' 62]]
